query: SELECT awayTeam, homeTeam, awayModelSpread, homeModelSpread, modelAwaySpreadOdds, modelHomeSpreadOdds, modelTotal, modelOverOdds, modelUnderOdds FROM games WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-19' AND sport = 'NCAAM' AND publishedModel = 1 LIMIT 6;
